comment: PUBLIC test keys for v402 reference test vectors. Deliberately published — anyone can re-derive them from the documented seeds. NEVER fund these addresses; anything sent to them is publicly spendable.
derivation: privkey = sha256(utf8(seed)); WIF = base58check(0xBC || privkey || 0x01) — Verus/Komodo mainnet+testnet WIF prefix, compressed public key

identities.name: v402test@
identities.note: Dedicated VRSCTEST identity for identity-signature cases; primary address is the published test key A, so ANY implementer can sign as v402test@ and regenerate these cases. VerusID signatures embed the signing block height, so these cases assert verify-validity, not byte-equality. Revocation/recovery authorities are steward-controlled (v402revoke@ / v402recover@). Never fund this identity.
